verses.geez: ወሰሚዖ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ሠጠጠ፡ አልባሲሁ፡ ወለብሰ፡ መንጸፈ፡ ወዐርገ፡ ቤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass, when king Ezekias heard it, that he rent his clothes, and put on sackcloth, and went up to the house of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when king Hezekiah heard it, that he rent his clothes, and covered himself with sackcloth, and went into the house of the LORD.

verses.geez: ወፈነዎሙ፡ ለኤልያቄም፡ መጋቢ፡ ወለስምናስ፡ ጸሐፊ፡ ወለረበናተ፡ ካህናት፡ እንዘ፡ ይለብሱ፡ መንጸፈ፤ ወበጽሑ፡ ኀበ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡ ነቢይ፡ ወልደ፡ አሞጽ።

translations.lxx: And he sent Heliakim the steward, and Somnas the scribe, and the elders of the priests clothed with sackcloth, to Esaias the son of Amos, the prophet. And they said to him, Thus says Ezekias,
translations.kjv: And he sent Eliakim, who was over the household, and Shebna the scribe, and the elders of the priests covered with sackcloth, unto Isaiah the prophet the son of Amoz.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ፡ ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፤ ዕለተ፡ ምንዳቤአ፡ ወኃሣር፡ ወመንሱትአ፡ ዛቲ፡ ዕለት፡ ዮምአ፡ እስመ፡ አልባአ፡ ኃይለአ፡ ለእንተአ፡ ትወልድአ፡ ወአኀዛ፡ ማሕምምአ።

translations.lxx: To-day is a day of affliction, and reproach, and rebuke, and anger: for the pangs are come upon the travailing woman, but she has not strength to bring forth.
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, Thus saith Hezekiah, This day is a day of trouble, and of rebuke, and of blasphemy: for the children are come to the birth, and there is not strength to bring forth.

verses.geez: ለይስማዕአ፡ እግዚአብሔርአ፡ አምላክከአ፡ ቃሎአ፡ ለራፋስቂስአ፡ ዘለአኮአ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ፡ ከመ፡ ይትዐየሮ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክ፡ ሕያው፣፡ ወተዐየረ፡ በነገር፡ ዘሰምዐ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክከ፣፡ ወጸሊ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክከ፡ በእንተ፡ እሉ፡ እለ፡ ተርፉ።

translations.lxx: May the Lord thy God hear the words of Rabsaces, which the king of the Assyrians has sent, to reproach the living God, even to reproach with the words which the Lord thy God has heard: therefore thou shalt pray to thy Lord for these that are left.
translations.kjv: It may be the LORD thy God will hear the words of Rabshakeh, whom the king of Assyria his master hath sent to reproach the living God, and will reprove the words which the LORD thy God hath heard: wherefore lift up thy prayer for the remnant that is left.

verses.geez: ወበጺሖሙ፡ ደቂቀ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ኀበ፡ ኢሳይያስ።

translations.lxx: So the servants of king Ezekias came to Esaias.
translations.kjv: So the servants of king Hezekiah came to Isaiah.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ፡ ኢሳይያስ፤ ከመዝ፡ በልዎ፡ ለእግዚእክሙ፤ ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፤ ኢትፍራህአ፡ እምነገር፡ ዘሰማዕከ፡ ዘተዐየረኒ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ።

translations.lxx: And Esaias said to them, Thus shall ye say to your master, Thus saith the Lord, Be not thou afraid at the words which thou hast heard, wherewith the ambassadors of the king of the Assyrians have reproached me.
translations.kjv: And Isaiah said unto them, Thus shall ye say unto your master, Thus saith the LORD, Be not afraid of the words that thou hast heard, wherewith the servants of the king of Assyria have blasphemed me.

verses.geez: ናሁአ፡ አነ፡ አመጽእ፡ ላዕሌሁ፡ ጋኔነ፡ ወይሰምዕ፡ ዜና፡ ወይሠወጥ፡ ብሔሮ፡ ወይመውት፡ በመጥባሕት፡ በብሔሩ።

translations.lxx: Behold, I will send a blast upon him, and he shall hear a report, and return to his own country, and he shall fall by the sword in his own land.
translations.kjv: Behold, I will send a blast upon him, and he shall hear a rumour, and return to his own land; and I will cause him to fall by the sword in his own land.

verses.geez: ወተሠውጠ፡ ራፋስቂስ፡ ወረከቦ፡ ለንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ፡ እንዘ፡ ይትቃተላ፡ ለሎምና፤ ወሰሚዖ፡ ከመ፡ ግዕዘ፡ እምለኪስ።

translations.lxx: So Rabsaces returned, and found the king of the Assyrians besieging Lobna: for he had heard that he had departed from Lachis.
translations.kjv: So Rabshakeh returned, and found the king of Assyria warring against Libnah: for he had heard that he was departed from Lachish.

verses.geez: ወፅአ፡ ተራቃታ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ ከመ፡ ይትቃተሎ፤ ወሰሚዖ፡ ተሠውጠ፡ ወፈነወ፡ ሐዋርያተ፡ ኀበ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል።

translations.lxx: And Tharaca king of the Ethiopians went forth to attack him. And when he heard it, he turned aside, and sent messengers to Ezekias, saying,
translations.kjv: And he heard say concerning Tirhakah king of Ethiopia, He is come forth to make war with thee. And when he heard it, he sent messengers to Hezekiah, saying,

verses.geez: ከመዝ፡ በልዎ፡ ለሕዝቅያስ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ይሁዳ፤ ኢያስሕትከአ፡ አምላክከ፡ ዘቦቱ፡ ተወከልከ፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል፡ ኢትገብእ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም፡ ውስተ፡ እዴሁ፡ ለንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ።

translations.lxx: Thus shall ye say to Ezekias king of Judea, Let not thy God, in whom thou trustest, deceive thee, saying, Jerusalem shall not be delivered into the hand of the king of the Assyrians.
translations.kjv: Thus shall ye speak to Hezekiah king of Judah, saying, Let not thy God, in whom thou trustest, deceive thee, saying, Jerusalem shall not be given into the hand of the king of Assyria.

verses.geez: ኢሰማዕከኑ፡ ዘገብሩ፡ ነገሥተ፡ ፋርስ፡ በኵሉ፡ በሐውርት፡ ዘከመ፡ አጥፍእዎሙ፡ ከመ፡ ትድኀን፡ አንተ።

translations.lxx: Hast thou not heard what the kings of the Assyrians have done, how they have destroyed the whole earth? and shalt thou be delivered?
translations.kjv: Behold, thou hast heard what the kings of Assyria have done to all lands by destroying them utterly; and shalt thou be delivered?

verses.geez: ቦኑ፡ ዘአድኀንዎሙ፡ አማልክቲሆሙ፡ ለአሕዛብ፡ ዘቀተሉ፡ አበውየ፡ በብሔረ፡ ኀሳን፡ ወራሴን፡ ወካራን፡ ዘደወለ፡ ቴማን።

translations.lxx: Have the gods of the nations which my fathers destroyed delivered them, both Gozan, and Charrhan, and Rapheth, which are in the land of Theemath?
translations.kjv: Have the gods of the nations delivered them which my fathers have destroyed, as Gozan, and Haran, and Rezeph, and the children of Eden which were in Telassar?

verses.geez: አይቴ፡ እሙንቱ፡ ነገሥተ፡ ሄማት፡ ወአርፋት፡ ወአህጉረ፡ ሴፋርሄም፡ ወምናሔ፡ ወጋዋን።

translations.lxx: Where are the kings of Emath? and where is the king of Arphath? and where is the king of the city of Eppharuaim, and of Anagugana?
translations.kjv: Where is the king of Hamath, and the king of Arphad, and the king of the city of Sepharvaim, Hena, and Ivah?

verses.geez: ወተመጠወ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ይእተ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ በኀበ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ወአንበባ፣፡ ወዐርገ፡ ቤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወከሠታ፡ በቅድመ፡ እግዚአብሔር።

translations.lxx: And Ezekias received the letter from the messengers, and read it, and went up to the house of the Lord, and opened it before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And Hezekiah received the letter from the hand of the messengers, and read it: and Hezekiah went up unto the house of the LORD, and spread it before the LORD.

verses.geez: ወጸለየ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወይቤ።

translations.lxx: And Ezekias prayed to the Lord, saying,
translations.kjv: And Hezekiah prayed unto the LORD, saying,

verses.geez: እግዚአብሔር፡ ጸባኦት፡ አምላከ፡ እስራኤል፡ ዘትነብር፡ ዲበ፡ ኪሩቤል፤ አንተ፡ አምላክ፡ ባሕቲትከ፡ ዲበ፡ ኵሉ፡ ነገሥታተ፡ ምድር፣፡ አንተ፡ ፈጠርከ፡ ሰማየ፡ ወምድረ።

translations.lxx: O Lord of hosts, God of Israel, who sittest upon the cherubs, thou alone art the God of every kingdom of the world: thou hast made heaven and earth.
translations.kjv: O LORD of hosts, God of Israel, that dwellest between the cherubims, thou art the God, even thou alone, of all the kingdoms of the earth: thou hast made heaven and earth.

verses.geez: ስማዕ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ወረአይ፡ እግዚኦ፡ ነገሮ፡ ለሰናክሬም፡ ዘለአከ፡ ከመ፡ ይትዐየሮ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው።

translations.lxx: Incline thine ear, O Lord, hearken, O Lord; open thine eyes, O Lord, look, O Lord: and behold the words of Sennacherim, which he has sent to reproach the living God.
translations.kjv: Incline thine ear, O LORD, and hear; open thine eyes, O LORD, and see: and hear all the words of Sennacherib, which hath sent to reproach the living God.

verses.geez: አማን፡ አማሰኑ፡ ኵሎ፡ ዓለመ፡ ነገሥተ፡ ፋርስ፡ ወበሐውርቲሆሙ።

translations.lxx: For of a truth, Lord, the kings of the Assyrians have laid waste the whole world, and the countries thereof,
translations.kjv: Of a truth, LORD, the kings of Assyria have laid waste all the nations, and their countries,

verses.geez: ወአማልክቲሆሙኒ፡ አውዐዩ፡ በእሳት፡ እስመ፡ ኢኮኑ፡ አማልክተ፡ አላ፡ ግብረ፡ እደ፡ ሰብእ፡ እሙንቱ፡ ዕፀው፡ ወአእባን፡ እሙንቱ፡ ወአጥፍእዎሙ።

translations.lxx: and have cast their idols into the fire: for they were no gods, but the work of men's hands, wood and stone; and they have cast them away.
translations.kjv: And have cast their gods into the fire: for they were no gods, but the work of men’s hands, wood and stone: therefore they have destroyed them.

verses.geez: ወአንተሰ፡ እግዚኦ፡ አምላክነ፡ አድኅነነ፡ እምእዴሁ፡ ከመ፡ ያእምሩ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ነገሥተ፡ ምድር፡ ከመ፡ አንተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ባሕቲትከ።

translations.lxx: But now, O Lord our God, deliver us from his hands, that every kingdom of the earth may know that thou art God alone.
translations.kjv: Now therefore, O LORD our God, save us from his hand, that all the kingdoms of the earth may know that thou art the LORD, even thou only.

verses.geez: ወተፈነወ፡ ኢሳይያስ፡ ወልደ፡ አሞጽ፡ ኀበ፡ ሕዝቅያስ፡ ወይቤሎ፤ ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክ፡ እስራኤል፡ ሰማዕኩ፡ ዘጸለይከ፡ ኀቤየ፡ በእንተ፡ ሰናክሬም፡ ንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ።

translations.lxx: And Esaias the son of Amos was sent to Ezekias, and said to him, Thus saith the Lord, the God of Israel, I have heard thy prayer to me concerning Sennacherim king of the Assyrians.
translations.kjv: Then Isaiah the son of Amoz sent unto Hezekiah, saying, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Whereas thou hast prayed to me against Sennacherib king of Assyria:

verses.geez: ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በእንቲአሁ፤ ጸዐለኪ፡ ወአስተአከየኪ፡ ድንግል፡ ወለተ፡ ጽዮን፤ ወአሖሰ፡ ርእሶ፡ ዲቤኪ፡ ወለተ፡ ኢየሩሳሌም።

translations.lxx: This is the word which God has spoken concerning him; The virgin daughter of Sion has despised thee, and mocked thee; the daughter of Jerusalem has shaken her head at thee.
translations.kjv: This is the word which the LORD hath spoken concerning him; The virgin, the daughter of Zion, hath despised thee, and laughed thee to scorn; the daughter of Jerusalem hath shaken her head at thee.

verses.geez: መነ፡ ተዐየርከ፡ ወወሀከ፤ ወለመኑ፡ አንሣእከ፡ ርእሰከ፤ ወለመኑ፡ አዕበይከ፡ ቃለከ፤ ወኢታነሥእኑ፡ ውስተ፡ አርያም፡ ዐይነከ፡ ወትኔጽር፡ ኀበ፡ ቅዱሰ፡ እስራኤል።

translations.lxx: Whom hast thou reproached and provoked? and against whom hast thou lifted up thy voice? and hast thou not lifted up thine eyes on high against the Holy One of Israel?
translations.kjv: Whom hast thou reproached and blasphemed? and against whom hast thou exalted thy voice, and lifted up thine eyes on high? even against the Holy One of Israel.

verses.geez: ከመ፡ ትትዐየሮ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ በሐዋርያቲከ።

translations.lxx: For thou hast reproached the Lord by messengers; for thou hast said, With the multitude of chariots have I ascended to the height of mountains, and to the sides of Libanus; and I have cropped the height of his cedars and the beauty of his cypresses; and I entered into the height of the forest region:
translations.kjv: By thy servants hast thou reproached the Lord, and hast said, By the multitude of my chariots am I come up to the height of the mountains, to the sides of Lebanon; and I will cut down the tall cedars thereof, and the choice fir trees thereof: and I will enter into the height of his border, and the forest of his Carmel.

verses.geez: ወሐጸርኩ፡ ወአንፀፍኩ፡ ማየ፡ ወኵሎ፡ ምቅዋመ፡ ማይ።

translations.lxx: and I have made a bridge, and dried up the waters, and every pool of water.
translations.kjv: I have digged, and drunk water; and with the sole of my feet have I dried up all the rivers of the besieged places.

verses.geez: ኢሰማዕከኑ፡ ዘንተ፡ ዘገበርኩ፡ አነ፡ ትካት፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ቀዲሙ፡ ዘአዘዝኩ፣፡ ወይእዜሰ፡ አርአይኩ፡ ከመ፡ አጥፍኦሙ፡ ለአሕዛብ፡ በውስተ፡ አጽዋኒሆሙ፡ ወለእለኒ፡ ይነብሩ፡ ውስተ፡ አህጉር፡ ወይጼወኑ።

translations.lxx: Hast thou not heard of these things which I did of old? I appointed them from ancient times; but now have I manifested my purpose of desolating nations in their strong holds, and them that dwell in strong cities.
translations.kjv: Hast thou not heard long ago, how I have done it; and of ancient times, that I have formed it? now have I brought it to pass, that thou shouldest be to lay waste defenced cities into ruinous heaps.

verses.geez: ወአመጽእ፡ እዴየ፡ ወይየብሱ፤ ወይከውኑ፡ ከመ፡ ሣዕር፡ ዘይየብስ፡ ውስተ፡ ናሕስ፡ ወከመ፡ ተሐግ።

translations.lxx: I weakened their hands, and they withered; and they became as dry grass on the house-tops, and as grass.
translations.kjv: Therefore their inhabitants were of small power, they were dismayed and confounded: they were as the grass of the field, and as the green herb, as the grass on the housetops, and as corn blasted before it be grown up.

verses.geez: ወይእዜሰ፡ አእመርኩ፡ ምብያቲከ፡ ወሙባአከ፡ ወሙፃአከ።

translations.lxx: But now I know thy rest, and thy going out, and thy coming in.
translations.kjv: But I know thy abode, and thy going out, and thy coming in, and thy rage against me.

verses.geez: መዐትከሂ፡ ዘተመዐዕከ፡ ወምረትከሂ፡ ዐርገ፡ ኀቤየ፤ ወእወዲ፡ ለከ፡ ዝማማተ፡ ውስተ፡ አንፍከ፡ ወልጓመ፡ ውስተ፡ ከናፍሪከ፤ ወእመይጠከ፡ በፍኖት፡ እንተ፡ ባቲ፡ መጻእከ።

translations.lxx: And thy wrath wherewith thou hast been enraged, and thy rancour has come up to me; therefore I will put a hook in thy nose, and a bit in thy lips, and will turn thee back by the way by which thou camest.
translations.kjv: Because thy rage against me, and thy tumult, is come up into mine ears, therefore will I put my hook in thy nose, and my bridle in thy lips, and I will turn thee back by the way by which thou camest.

verses.geez: ወዝንቱ፡ ትእምርትከ።

translations.lxx: And this shall be a sign to thee, Eat this year what thou hast sown; and the second year that which is left: and the third year sow, and reap, and plant vineyards, and eat the fruit of them.
translations.kjv: And this shall be a sign unto thee, Ye shall eat this year such as groweth of itself; and the second year that which springeth of the same: and in the third year sow ye, and reap, and plant vineyards, and eat the fruit thereof.

verses.geez: ወይሠርጽ፡ ሥርዎሙ፡ ለእለ፡ ተርፉ፡ በይሁዳ፡ ወይፈሪ፡ ዘርኦሙ፡ በላዕሉ።

translations.lxx: And they that are left in Judea shall take root downward, and bear fruit upward:
translations.kjv: And the remnant that is escaped of the house of Judah shall again take root downward, and bear fruit upward:

verses.geez: እስመ፡ እምኢየሩሳሌም፡ ይከውኑ፡ እለ፡ ተርፉ፡ ወእለሂ፡ ይድኅኑ፡ እምደብረ፡ ጽዮን፤ ቅንአቱ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ጸባኦት፡ ይገብር፡ ዘንተ።

translations.lxx: for out of Jerusalem there shall be a remnant, and the saved ones out of mount Sion: the zeal of the Lord of hosts shall perform this.
translations.kjv: For out of Jerusalem shall go forth a remnant, and they that escape out of mount Zion: the zeal of the LORD of hosts shall do this.

verses.geez: በእንተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ከመዝ፡ ይቤ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ለንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ፡ ኢይበውኣ፡ ለዛቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ወኢይነድፍ፡ ውስቴታ፡ ሐፀ፡ ወኢይሠይም፡ ላዕሌሃ፡ ወልታ፡ ወኢየሐጽራ።

translations.lxx: Therefore thus saith the Lord concerning the king of the Assyrians, He shall not enter into this city, nor cast a weapon against it, nor bring a shield against it, nor make a rampart round it.
translations.kjv: Therefore thus saith the LORD concerning the king of Assyria, He shall not come into this city, nor shoot an arrow there, nor come before it with shields, nor cast a bank against it.

verses.geez: ወይሠወጥ፡ በፍኖት፡ እንተ፡ ባቲ፡ መጽአ፡ ወኢይበውኣ፡ ለዛቲ፡ ሀገር።

translations.lxx: But by the way by which he came, by it shall he return, and shall not enter into this city: thus saith the Lord.
translations.kjv: By the way that he came, by the same shall he return, and shall not come into this city, saith the LORD.

verses.geez: እረድኣ፡ ለዛቲ፡ ሀገር፡ ወአድኅና፡ በእንቲአየ፡ ወበእንተ፡ ዳዊት፡ ቍልዔየ።

translations.lxx: I will protect this city to save it for my own sake, and for my servant David's sake.
translations.kjv: For I will defend this city to save it for mine own sake, and for my servant David’s sake.

verses.geez: ወእምዝ፡ ወፅአ፡ መልአከ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወቀተለ፡ እምትዕይንተ፡ ፋርስ፡ ዐሠርተ፡ ወሰመንተ፡ እምፈ፡ ወኃምሳ፡ ምእተ፡ ዕደወ፤ ወነቂሆሙ፡ በጽባሕ፡ ረከቡ፡ አብድንቲሆሙ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ በኀበ፡ ሞቱ።

translations.lxx: And the angel of the Lord went forth, and slew out of the camp of the Assyrians a hundred and eighty-five thousand: and they arose in the morning and found all these bodies dead.
translations.kjv: Then the angel of the LORD went forth, and smote in the camp of the Assyrians a hundred and fourscore and five thousand: and when they arose early in the morning, behold, they were all dead corpses.

verses.geez: ወተሠውጠ፡ ሰናክሬም፡ ንጉሠ፡ ፋርስ፡ ወነበረ፡ ነነዌ።

translations.lxx: And Sennacherim king of the Assyrians turned and departed, and dwelt in Nineve.
translations.kjv: So Sennacherib king of Assyria departed, and went and returned, and dwelt at Nineveh.

verses.geez: ወእንዘ፡ ይሰግድ፡ በቤተ፡ ሲድራክ፡ አምላኩ፣፡ አድራሜሌክ፡ ወሳራሳር፡ ደቂቁ፡ ቀተልዎ፡ በመጥባሕት፤ ወአምሠጡ፡ ውስተ፡ አርሜንያ፡ ሀገር።

translations.lxx: And while he was worshipping Nasarach his country's god in the house, Adramelech and Sarasar his sons smote him with swords; and they escaped into Armenia: and Asordan his son reigned in his stead.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as he was worshipping in the house of Nisroch his god, that Adrammelech and Sharezer his sons smote him with the sword; and they escaped into the land of Armenia: and Esarhaddon his son reigned in his stead.
